import pytest
from source import filter_expensive_items

def test_type_coercion_price():
    items = [
        {'name': 'A', 'price': 100},
        {'name': 'B', 'price': '200'},
        {'name': 'C', 'price': 150}
    ]
    threshold = 150
    # Expected result: only item B with price '200' (converted to int) should be above threshold
    # Buggy code raises TypeError when comparing '200' > 150
    result = filter_expensive_items(items, threshold)
    assert len(result) == 1
    assert result[0]['name'] == 'B'
